strengths: Strong TypeScript and full-stack proficiency with hands-on React and AWS CDK usage across multiple production roles
Demonstrated commitment to clean architecture, TDD, and software craftsmanship — directly aligned with the role's architectural interest requirement
Covers most nice-to-have qualifications: LLM/MCP integration, Kubernetes, AWS services, bringing senior-level depth to junior-scoped responsibilities
concerns: Significantly overqualified — 15+ years at Staff/Senior level; a junior/mid role is unlikely to match career trajectory or compensation expectations
Based in Lagos, Nigeria, which conflicts with the high on-site presence requirement for what appears to be a Berlin-based position
No explicit PostgreSQL experience listed; primary database exposure is MongoDB and MySQL, which may require ramp-up on the preferred stack
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is technically well-suited to the stack — strong TypeScript, React, AWS, Kubernetes, and AI tooling — but the role is a poor structural fit on two critical dimensions: he is a Staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level position, which raises questions about motivation and retention risk, and he is currently based in Lagos, Nigeria, which is incompatible with the high on-site presence requirement. Unless there is a relocation plan or remote flexibility not stated in the job description, these factors substantially reduce practical suitability despite strong technical alignment.
